title: AppleSMP Modpack
description: A Modpack Designed in mind for the AppleSMP Server focused on giving a wide variety of mods.
body:
![AppleSMP Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1f080fe68b9a0ecbebc932b7074cec195b9aac2.png)
## A Modpack Designed in mind for the AppleSMP Server. 

### Featuring... 
- Tech mods like Create and Tech Reborn
- Quality of Life mods like LambDynamicLights and Appleskin
- Custom menus using FancyMenu and DrippyLoadingScreen
- Silly mods like Emotecraft and Immersive Melodies
- Mods to help with travel like Immersive Aircraft and Icarus
- Bugfixes like ModernFix and Debugify
- Performance mods like Sodium and Lithium

... and lots and lots more!
